CV

Basanta Khakurel

A pdf of my CV can be found here

PhD Student with Dr. Sebastian Höhna at Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München.

basantakhakurel@gmail.com | My Github Profile

Currently

Graduate Research Assistant at Höhna Lab

Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München

Specialized in

RevBayes, Bayesian statistics, Morphological Phylogenetics, Systematics

Research interests

Computational Biology, Morphological Phylogenetics.

Education

May 2021 - August 2023 Masters of Science in Biology

Southeastern Louisiana University, Hammond, LA.

August 2017- May 2021 Bachelors of Science in Biology Southeastern Louisiana University, Hammond, LA.

Awards

2023

SSB Travel Award, Society of Systematic Biologists

2022

Distinguished Graduate Fellowship, Department of Biological Sciences and the Dean of the College of Science and Technology, Hammond, LA

Graduate Reserach Fellowship, Louisiana Biomedical Research Network

2021

David Ware Outstanding International Student Award, Southeastern Louisiana University

Outstanding Senior Award, Department of Biological Sciences, Southeastern Louisiana University

2019

Sophomore Honors Distinction, Honors Dearment at Southeastern Louisiana University

Publications

A list is also available online

In-Prep:

Khakurel B, Grigsby C, Tran T, Zariwala J, Höhna S, Wright AM. In Review. The fundamental role of character coding in Bayesian morphological phylogenetics

Khakurel B, Pett W, Heath T, Wright AM. In Prep. Site-Heterogeneous Character Change Models for Morphology.

Accepted:

Khakurel B, Nikolakis ZL, Crother B, Wright AM. Species Delimitation in Eastern Pine snakes (Pituophis melanoleucus)

Published:

2022 Genomic data support the taxonomic validity of Middle American livebearera Poeciliopsis gracilis and Poeciliopsis pleurospilus (Cyprinodontiformes: Poeciliidae)

Experiences

2023 - Present Graduate Research Assistant at Höhna Lab, Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München

2021 - 2023 Graduate Research Assistant at Wright Lab SELU, Southeastern Louisiana University, Hammond, LA
